_citation: Jegadeesh & Titman, J. Finance 48(1) 1993; Asness, Moskowitz, Pedersen 2013 ("Value and Momentum Everywhere") for cross-asset version
_universe_rationale: Wave-4 cross-asset variant of xsec_momentum_236b86 (sector-equity, REJECT). Universe spans 4 asset classes: SPY (US equity broad), EFA (developed-intl equity), TLT (long bonds), VNQ (US REITs), DBC (broad commodities), GLD (gold). Picked to maximize dispersion vs sector-equity universe where all 11 SPDRs share 0.7-0.9 SPY beta. Binding history constraint: DBC inception 2006-02-03.
_top_k_rationale: Rule of thumb K ~ N/3 for cross-asset; with N=6 that's K=2. K=1 (degenerate single-asset rotation) and K=3 (half-the-universe) reported as sensitivity in the report.
_safety_note: safety_max_loss_pct is the HARD runaway rail enforced by runner/safety_backstop.py. -50% means a leg would have to halve before the rail fires. Not for entry/exit logic.
